basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi University (RGU) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 3 Field Investigator Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with qualification can directly attend the interview on 06 August 2026.Candidates are advised to reach the walk-in venue on time with all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. content_sections.heading: RGU Field Investigator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RGU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for RGU Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: RGU Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGU Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and candidates should attend the interview on the specified date. There is no separate application deadline mentioned.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies for Field Investigators?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Field Investigator position at Rajiv Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the venue on the interview date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for RGU Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Investigator post is scheduled to be held on 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RGU Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Rajiv Gandhi University, Doimukh, Arunachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Investigator role will be based on an Interview.
